atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports headaches when their blood pressure gets really high.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient has noticed they no longer see their blood pressures.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports feeling high blood pressure.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient measures blood pressure at home.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient is taking carvedilol 25 milligrams twice a day.

atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient is taking norvasc 10 milligrams daily.

atomic_propositions.speaker: test_result
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient's blood pressure was as high as 170 over 90.

atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient has high blood pressure.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The doctor wants the patient to keep a record of their blood pressures for their next visit.
